---
name: Bug report
about: Something is broken or not working as expected
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what is wrong.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Add the section to a product page
2. Configure '...'
3. Navigate to '...'
4. See the issue

## Expected behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour

What actually happened. Include a screenshot or screen recording if possible.

## Environment

- Shopify theme base: (e.g. Dawn 15, Sense 8)
- Browser: (e.g. Chrome 122, Safari 17)
- Device: (e.g. Desktop, iPhone 15)
- Section version / commit: (e.g. latest, `35dbea2`)

## Relevant settings

Which block type or section settings are involved? (e.g. Media Carousel, infinite loop enabled, 3 desktop cards)

## Additional context

Any other context, error messages, or console output.
